channel.title: International Journal of Digital Earth RSS
channel.description: International Journal of Digital Earth articles from 2026-06-01 to the current run date.

item.title: Multi-level grid management and retrieval model for rainfall data using sequential encoding
item.description:
Ri Huang, Daoye Zhu, Mingyang Xu, Shihao Zheng, Haoling Xie, Yanggeng Fu
International Journal of Digital Earth, vol. 19, issue 1
DOI: 10.1080/17538947.2026.2677950

item.description:

International Journal of Digital Earth, vol. 19, issue 1
DOI: 10.1080/17538947.2026.2689233
